mapper.sql: swd.id, swd.income_period, swd.distribution_method_id, swd.distribution_method, swd.generation_differentiation_flag, swd.production_factor, swd.quality_factor, swd.attribute5, swd.attribute4, swd.attribute3, swd.attribute1, swd.attribute2, swd.create_time, swd.create_by, swd.update_time, swd.update_by, swd.enabled_flag

${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.income_period as ${tAlias}_income_period, ${tAlias}.distribution_method_department_id as ${tAlias}_distribution_method_id, ${tAlias}.distribution_method as ${tAlias}_distribution_method, ${tAlias}.generation_differentiation_flag as ${tAlias}_generation_differentiation_flag, ${tAlias}.production_factor as ${tAlias}_production_factor, ${tAlias}.quality_factor as ${tAlias}_quality_factor, ${tAlias}.attribute5 as ${tAlias}_attribute5, ${tAlias}.attribute4 as ${tAlias}_attribute4, ${tAlias}.attribute3 as ${tAlias}_attribute3, ${tAlias}.attribute1 as ${tAlias}_attribute1, ${tAlias}.attribute2 as ${tAlias}_attribute2, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by, ${tAlias}.enabled_flag as ${tAlias}_enabled_flag
mapper.insert: insert into swm_wage_distribution (income_period, distribution_method_id, distribution_method, generation_differentiation_flag, production_factor, quality_factor, attribute5, attribute4, attribute3, attribute1, attribute2, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by, enabled_flag) values (#{incomePeriod,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{distributionMethodId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{distributionMethod,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{generationDifferentiationFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{productionFactor,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{qualityFactor,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{attribute5,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{attribute4,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{attribute3,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{attribute1,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{attribute2,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{enabledFlag, jdbcType=BIT})
mapper.update: update swm_wage_distribution set income_period = #{incomePeriod,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, distribution_method_id = #{distributionMethodId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, distribution_method = #{distributionMethod,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, generation_differentiation_flag = #{generationDifferentiationFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, production_factor = #{productionFactor,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, quality_factor = #{qualityFactor,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, attribute5 = #{attribute5,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, attribute4 = #{attribute4,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, attribute3 = #{attribute3,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, attribute1 = #{attribute1,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, attribute2 = #{attribute2,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, enabled_flag = #{enabledFlag, jdbcType=BIT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
update swm_wage_distribution set enabled_flag = 0 where income_period = #{period, jdbcType = VARCHAR} and enabled_flag = 1
mapper.select: select count(1) from swm_wage_distribution swd where swd.enabled_flag = 1 and swd.income_period = #{period, jdbcType = VARCHAR}
